---
title: "Produtos"
tbl-colwidths: [15,15,15,15,40]
---

<table style="border-collapse:collapse;border-color:#ccc;border-spacing:0" class="tg"><thead><tr><th style="background-color:#F0F0F0;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:normal;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="font-weight:normal;color:#333;background-color:#F0F0F0">Product category</span><br></th><th style="background-color:#F0F0F0;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:normal;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="font-weight:normal;color:#333;background-color:#F0F0F0">VC stage</span></th><th style="background-color:#F0F0F0;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:normal;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="font-weight:normal;color:#333;background-color:#F0F0F0">HS Product category</span></th><th style="background-color:#F0F0F0;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:normal;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="font-weight:normal;color:#333;background-color:#F0F0F0">HS code</span></th><th style="background-color:#F0F0F0;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:normal;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="font-weight:normal;color:#333;background-color:#F0F0F0">Description</span></th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Balloons</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880100</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Balloons and dirigibles; gliders, hang gliders and other non-powered </span><span style="background-color:#F9F9F9">aircraft.</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Helicopters</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">880211</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Helicopters; of an unladen weight not exceeding 2000kg</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Helicopters</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880212</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Helicopters; of an unladen weight exceeding 2000kg</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Airplanes</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">880220</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Aeroplanes &amp; other aircraft, of an unladen weight not &gt;2000kg</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Airplanes</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880230</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Aeroplanes &amp; other aircraft, of an unladen weight &gt;2000 kg but not &gt;15000kg</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Airplanes</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">880240</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Aeroplanes &amp; other aircraft, of an unladen weight &gt;15000kg</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Final </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">products</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Spacecraft</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880260</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Spacecraft (incl. satellites) &amp; suborbital &amp; spacecraft launch vehicles</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Landing gear</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">880320</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Under-carriages &amp; parts thereof , of goods of 88.01/88.02</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Aircraft parts &amp; </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">assemblies (generic)</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880330</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Parts of aeroplanes/helicopters, other than propellers, rotors, under-carriages &amp; parts thereof</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Propellers &amp; rotors</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">880310</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Propellers &amp; rotors &amp; parts thereof , of goods of 88.01/88.02</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Other parts</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880390</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Parts of goods of 88.01/88.02, n.e.s. in 88.03</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Main engine </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">(propulsion)</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">840890</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Internal combustion piston engines (diesel/semi-diesel engines) (excl. of 8408.10 &amp; 8408.20)</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Main engine </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">(propulsion)</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">841111</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Turbo-jets, of a thrust not &gt;25kN</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Main engine </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">(propulsion)</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">841112</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Turbo-jets, of a thrust &gt;25 kN</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Main engine </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">(propulsion)</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">841121</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Turbo-propellers, of a power not &gt;1,100kW</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Main engine </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">(propulsion)</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">841122</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Turbo-propellers, of a power &gt;1,100kW</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Other engines (other </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">on-board engines)</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">840710</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Spark-ignition reciprocating/rotary internal combustion piston engines for aircraft</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Other engines (other </span><br><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">on-board engines)</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">841210</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Reaction engines other than turbo-jets</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Launching gear</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880510</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Aircraft launching gear &amp; parts thereof ; deck-arrestor/similar gear &amp; parts thereof</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Ground trainers</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">880521</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Ground flying trainers and parts thereof; air combat simulators and parts thereof</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Ground trainers</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">880529</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Ground flying trainers and parts thereof; other than air combat simulators and parts thereof</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Sub-assemblies</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Interior</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">940110</span></td><td style="background-color:#FFF;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#FFF">Seats; of a kind used for aircraft</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Propulsion systems</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Components</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Main engine</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">841191</span></td><td style="background-color:#F9F9F9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333;background-color:#F9F9F9">Turbines; parts of turbo-jets and turbo-propellers</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:#ffffff;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal">Propulsion systems</td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:#ffffff;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal">Components</td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:#ffffff;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal">Other engines</td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:#ffffff;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal">840910</td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:#ffffff;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal">Engines; parts of aircraft engines (spark-ignition reciprocating or rotary internal combustion piston engines)</td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Components</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Landing gear</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">401130</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">New pneumatic tyres, of rubber, of a kind used on aircraft</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Components</span></td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Landing gear</span></td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">401213</span></td><td style="background-color:#ffffff;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Retreaded pneumatic tyres of rubber, of a kind used on aircraft</span></td></tr><tr><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Other components</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Components</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Electronic instruments</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">901420</span></td><td style="background-color:#f9f9f9;border-bottom-width:1px;border-color:inherit;border-style:solid;border-top-width:1px;border-width:0px;color:#333;font-family:Arial, sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden;padding:10px 5px;text-align:left;vertical-align:top;word-break:normal"><span style="color:#333">Instruments &amp; appliances for aeronautical/space navigation (excl. compasses)</span></td></tr></tbody></table>
